profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your profile details, security settings, order history, and app configuration.

seo.defaultProductDesc: Discover modern clothing, state-of-the-art electronics, and premium accessories tailored for your lifestyle. Registered and built in Phnom Penh, Cambodia.

product.loadingDesc: Please wait while we fetch the product details.
product.notFoundDesc: The product you are looking for does not exist or has been removed.
product.noSpecifications: No specifications available for this product.

category.noProducts: No products found in this category yet.

apiError.401: Invalid email or password. Please check your credentials and try again.
apiError.403: You do not have permission to perform this action or your account requires verification.
apiError.404: The requested resource or account could not be found.
apiError.422: The provided information is invalid. Please check your input and try again.
apiError.429: Too many requests. Please wait a moment before trying again.
apiError.500: Server error. Our team has been notified. Please try again later.
apiError.default: Something went wrong. Please try again.

wishlist.title: Your Wishlist Awaits
wishlist.subtitle: Save the products you love, build your dream collection, and add them to cart whenever you're ready. It only takes a moment to sign in.

cart.title: Your Cart
cart.signInDesc: Log in to your account to add items, save your cart, and checkout securely.
cart.emptyDesc: Looks like you haven't added any products to your cart yet.

discount.description: Discover our limited-time special promotions across top categories. Grab your favorite deals before the countdown runs out!

newsletter.title: Stay in the Loop
newsletter.subtitle: Subscribe to receive early access to weekly deals, curated collections, and exclusive product drops.
newsletter.error: Failed to subscribe. Please try again.

footer.defaultDesc: Discover what defines modern living. Shop our premium collections of clothing, accessories, and state-of-the-art electronics.

checkout.title: Secure Checkout
checkout.subtitle: Complete your order by providing shipping and payment details below.
checkout.streetPlaceholder: e.g., St. 271, House #12B, Khan Chamkar Mon
checkout.khqrDesc: Scan & Pay instantly with any banking app that supports KHQR.
checkout.codDesc: Pay in cash when you receive your delivery.
checkout.emptyCart: Your cart is empty. Please add items before checking out.
checkout.successDesc: Thank you for your order. We have received your order details and will begin preparing your shipment.
checkout.locWarningOutsidePP: Your location seems to be outside Phnom Penh. Please note that provincial deliveries incur a $2.00 delivery fee.
checkout.locWarningInsidePP: Your location seems to be in Phnom Penh. Please double-check your selected province.

dashboard.subtitle: Manage your preferences, track deliveries, and check active community items.
dashboard.editProfileDesc: Update personal details, address, and login password.
dashboard.shopCatalogDesc: Browse modern items, toggle filters, and discover essentials.
dashboard.activeDealsDesc: View discounted items and free shipping qualifying deals.
